caption: A person's hands are seen interacting with a stack of small boxes on a table covered with a tropical-themed mat featuring palm trees. The boxes consist of a small yellow box resting on top of two larger white boxes. In the background, a man wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt is visible, sitting behind a desk with equipment. The logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" appear prominently in the upper background of the scene. As the sequence progresses, a hand reaches in to lift the small yellow box off the top of the stack. The yellow box is then lifted completely away from the white boxes and held up for the camera. The background remains consistent throughout, with the man and the equipment staying in place while the focus remains on the movement of the yellow box.
